item.title: Natural Pigments Recalls Rublev Colours Gum Turpentine and Mineral Spirits Bottles Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Child Poisoning; Violates Mandatory Standard for Child-Resistant Packaging
item.company: Natural Pigments LLC, of Willits, California
item.brand: Natural Pigments LLC, of Willits, California
item.product: Rublev Colours Gum Turpentine and Mineral Spirits Bottles
item.summary: This recall involves the bottles of Rublev Colours Gum Turpentine and Mineral Spirits. The bottles are made of amber glass and have a beige, orange, and white label. The labels have "Rublev Colours" in white lettering and the two bottles have "Gum Turpentine", "Distilled Spirits of Gum Turpentine" or "Mineral Spirits", "Stoddard Solvent" printed on the bottles. Both bottles have warnings and directions for use on the white areas of the labels.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Rublev Colours Gum Turpentine and Mineral Spirits Bottles.
item.remedy: Consumers should secure the recalled bottles out of sight and reach of children immediately and contact Natural Pigments to receive a replacement product with child-resistant packaging or a refund. Consumers will be asked to submit a photo of the recalled product, provide contact information and confirm disposal of the contents before receiving a replacement product with child-resistant packaging or a refund.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
